kpi.prompt: Anzahl Bankbuchungen auf dem aktuellen Konto, die keiner Rechnung oder Zahlung zugeordnet sind; ein einzelner Datensatz.
kpi.sql_string:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS "Anzahl Bankbuchungen"
FROM bank_statements bs
LEFT JOIN incoming_bank_statements ibs
  ON bs.bank_statement_id = ibs.bank_statement_id
LEFT JOIN outgoing_bank_statements obs
  ON bs.bank_statement_id = obs.bank_statement_id
WHERE
  bs.account_id = (
    SELECT account_id
    FROM accounts
    WHERE is_active = TRUE
      AND is_deleted = FALSE
    ORDER BY last_import DESC NULLS LAST, account_id DESC
    LIMIT 1
  )
  AND bs.has_import_error = FALSE
  AND COALESCE(bs.document_of_origin_id, 0) = 0
  AND COALESCE(bs.preselection_document_of_origin_id, 0) = 0
  AND ibs.incoming_bank_statement_id IS NULL
  AND obs.outgoing_bank_statement_id IS NULL;

en.title: Unmatched transactions
en.description: Bank transactions on the account that the system could not link to any invoice or payment.

de.title: Unzugeordnet
de.description: Bankbuchungen auf dem Konto, die das System keiner Rechnung oder Zahlung zuordnen konnte.
